title: Verifier for Subastas Nocturnas/Oscuras
description:
A mod that allows you to participate in the Auctions that will be organized on Diosesmc.net
Un mod que te permite participar en las Subastas que se organizaran en DiosesMC.net
body:
Requirements: 
-For Minecraft 1.21.10: fabric-api 0.136.0+1.21.10 and fabric loader 0.17.2. -For Minecraft 1.21.8: fabric-api 0.133.3+1.21.8 and fabric loader 0.17.2.

Usage Tutorial: 
Join the DiosesMC.net minecraft server. 
Run the command /subastasperfil, the options "lobos" and "hermandad" will appear, you have to select the one from the host of the currect auctions at the time and the you use the command /balance. 
The mod detects your balance from the chat and sends it to the verifier. 
If you are eligible, the mod will display a link on the game chat and when pressed this will open your default browser, there you have to input your Username as it appears on Minecraft and log in.

Requisitos:
-Para Minecraft 1.21.10: fabric-api 0.136.0+1.21.10 y fabric loader 0.17.2.
-Para Minecraft 1.21.8: fabric-api 0.133.3+1.21.8 y fabric loader 0.17.2.

Tutorial de uso:
Entra al servidor de minecraft DiosesMC.net.
Ejecuta el comando /subastasperfil, saldran las opciones: "lobos" y "hermandad", seleccionas la de quien este hosteando una subasta en ese momento, luego Ejecuta el comando /balance.
El mod detecta tu saldo desde el chat y lo envía al verificador.
Si eres elegible, el mod te mostrara un link en el chat
Presionar este link abrira tu navegador predeterminado y ahi solo debes poner tu username de Minecraft tal cual es e iniciar sesion
.
